TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Guanxi Guanxi a sakuwan ku Hsinchu. kumud nu kalesakan, 125.2 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu lin-pan-ti 3.89 km¬≤, kalesakan nu paw-liw-ti 2.37 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 468 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 177 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 267 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakala tu 57% (Atayal) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Guanxi mala 21 a cuwen atu tusa ku niyazu'. kina tusa a niyazu' sa, Qalang m'utu , Qalang q'yulang . Guanxi :guanňč siňč zhinňäÔľõŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:guanňä xiňä ziinňč) . Guanxi "Taywan ngayngay a ngalngal han u halu a ngalngalan, guanňč siňč zhinňä, sepat a kinngan nu ngalngalan, guanňä xiňä ziinňč"u Taywan Sin-cu-kin nu cacay a niyadu'an", itida i Sin-cu-se nu wali amisan, u Niwlan sauwac atu fun-san sauwac nu kapulungan a kakaydaan nu nanum. timulan sibiyaw tu Jianshi , hen-saa niyadu' , nutipan timulan militin tu Cun-lin-niyadu'an , nutipan amisan u Sin-pu-niyaduan , amis u Taw-yung-se Lung-tan niyadu' , waliyan mililis tu Taw-yung-se Fusin-niyadu'an ,Tasi-niyadu' u satabakiay nu lilis nu sicuku a masaenalay nu lalaan, tademaw han sayadahay nu ngayngayan, makaala tu sawa nu kilacan, ngalngal han u haylu atu sesin ku ngangangan. naayaw naw Cun-hua-mink-uo lukungu' a kitidaan nu sakatusa a lasubu idaw ku enem (206) a masakaputay nu angangangan a kakitidaan nu hitay. Guanxi sasi laculay nu tuudan, singanganay nu kakanen idaw ku sen-caw , nipacikahan tu kulang , kamulaw , kamacal , kama' , ucia'sa ,micidek ku Guanxi sencaw u sasasingangan, u papalumaan tu sencaw a kakitidaan, sakasilaculan han itini i Taywan u enem a bataan (60%) a kilac. tumihmihcaan idwa tu ku nipikasikawaw tu sencaw hananay a kawaw. Guanxi malumanay a ngangan han u nipacikahan tu kulang tedus han, kadipuna han sumad han tu Guanxi-niyadu' , malalit nu nipacika han tu kulang a dabek "nipacika han tu kulang" sanu dipunnen amiasip mahida u Kansai malecad a asipen, sisa sumad han nu dipu a tademaw katukuh ayda kuni kasi nganganan. amica ku nika ngayngay nami a binacadan, nika u piti yung-cu-min ku sausi tina niyaduan, u yungcumin a tademaw itida i Guanxi pulung han makaala tu cacay tin walu (1.8%)a kilac, saanganganan itida i Guanxi waliyan a buyu nu niyaduan u Cinsan-li idaw ku pinaay nu muengngay a Tayalu itida "Maudu niyadu', Qyulang niyadu'"a niyaduan (ť¶¨ś≠¶ÁĚ£ťÉ®ŤźĹ,śąąŚį§śĶ™(Qyulang)ťÉ®ŤźĹ).. kitidaan Guanxi tada waliyan u Cinsan-li wucuy a buyu' sangucud nu ayam a buyu, tada nutipan u Tun-pin-li law-ken-leaw, tada timulan u I'-san-li San-cuon-ken, tada amisan u Tun-pin-li Naken. . teban nu kitidaan wali kaydaan cacay a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay. cacay a bataan a du (121.10), amis nu uidu' han tusa a bataan idaw ku sebat sepat a walu a du (24.48). nutipan han u masa kubuay a enalan a lala', dumasa wali timulan amis tulu a sasuayawan masababuy nu malalitinay a buyu', u yadahay nu ,masabauybauyay a buyu' nu masa likelunay a lala'. wali nutipan tanayu' makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay (21) a kun-li, timulan amisan nu a hebal han cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat tin sepat (14.4) a kun-li. pulung nu kakitidaan makaala tu cacay a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku lima tin lima (125.5) a pin-bun-kun-li, nu Sin-cu-ku inaka satabakiay nu kakitidaan a niyadu'an. ilabu nu kitidaan satalakaway nu buyu han u wucuo a buyu, talakaw makaala tu cacay a malabut pitu a lasubu siwa a bataan (1790) a kunce. saka pulungan nu kasilaculan a niyadu' han itida i Niw-lan sawac atu Fun'-san sawac nu ni kalalitemuhan a masakayakaya'a sawac nu lala, u Sincu-ku inakaan a niyadu' wali amin nu buyuan, timulan amisan kakaydaan nu kadideng atu waliyan nutipan kalalitemuhan nu kadideng kasalu'imengan nu kadideng, tawya ka laliyunan tu sakaudip nu cancanan a papaliwalan tu tuud, naw atu Sincu-se kitidaan, Cutun-cen nu sakalecad tu Sincu kakitidaan nu tuluay a satabakiya nu niyaduan. kapicidekan nu sakaudip ni palumaan Guanxi a san-caw, kamacal papalumaan nuheni itida i Fun-san sawac nu nikaydaan numasaenalay a lala', papaluma' nu heni tu san-caw a kawaw han u "cacay a mihcaan ku tipus, cacay a mihcaan ku san-caw" u nanumay a tipus malaliyun palumaa. u satabakiay nu papalumaan nu Taywan a papalumaan a kakitidaan. 83%. tada' papalumaan han itida i San-lin-li , Sin-li'-li , Se-kun-li atu Na-he-li , papalumaan nuheni mikiahebal tu Taywan nu sepatay a bataan idaw ku lima (45%) a kilac, papalumaan tu kamacal han i cacay a bataan (10) a bulad katukuh i sakatusa a mihcaan tu sepatay (4), u Sin-cu-ku a satabakiay nu misatadasay a papalumaan, papalumaan a lala' han mikikaka tu Sin-cu-kin tu walu a bataan idaw ku tulu (83%) a kakilacan. papalumaan tu uciya itida i Ta-han-ken atu Kuon-ce-kuo masababuya'ay nu lalikelunan, u amisan a papalumaan tu uciya sakasilaculan a niyadu, u saka silaculan tu i tankunngay a lalaculan tu auciayan a aalan, u Sincu-kan stabakiay nu papalumaan a niyadu'an, papalumaan makaala tu (sepat a bataan idaw ku tusa a kakilacan) (42%) nu Sin-cu-kintu . papalumaan tu kama' mami itida i masababuya nu likelunan lala' atu buyubuyu'an, i Na-hen-li , Sin-li'-li , San-lin-li , Sin-fu'-li , I'-san-li , Cin-san-li , Cen-san-li ku papalumaan tu kamakamaan a niyadu'. papalumaan tu budu', kahu papalumaan han itida i Cin-san-li , Cin'-san-li atu Maw-u-du a niyadu'an, u niyadu'ay a tademaw ngayngay atu yung-cu-min masasupadang ku nuheni tu sakasilaculan. Sin-cu-ku Guanxi aidangan Mau-du kakiliman a kilangkilangan matumes nu bangsis nu kilangkilangan a ha hanhannan Sin-cu-ku tataydaan nu payluma'an a midang, kapawanan tu ku ngelu' a kilangkilangan, tataydaan tu lalud a sakapahay a midang. Sin-cu-ku sapakatineng tu tataydaan amidang, tayni i Ma-wu-du kilangkilangan a muculil ahemaw lihalay culilan, sabangcalay a hinukiyan i sasa' nu lidunglidungan a muculil atu i cascassan u sakapahay a tataydaan tu laludlaludan amikilidung a aidangan. tayni i buyubuyu'an misaculilculil, Ma-wu-du a tataydaan nu kilangkilangaan amidang, mahidahenay nu sumamaday kya tataydaan a midang, u sasalamaan cacay ka yadah kunipicunus tu sasalamaan, taneng tayda pakunida han ku balucu' a tayda itida amisaculilculil i kilangkilangan, misadid tu sakay balucu' nu mita, sakanamuhan micapi tu sakalihalay nu tataydaan numita. . Ma-wu-du a kilangkilangan nu ayawan u "Cen-sin kilangkilangan aaidangan nu kakitidaan" itayda i Sin-cu-kin Guanxi Ma-wu-du a niyaduan, Censan-li Ma-wu-du itidaay muenengay a tademaw, u ngayngay namin ku yadah cacaycacay ku muenengay nu Tayalu a tademaw. miladay tu adiwawaw tayda itida a amisaculilculil salihalay a sakapahay nu papasubanaan a cacudadan tu taydaan nu cacudadan, sapabeli tu adiwawaw a sakacay kalecad nu aadihan a mata'. Ma-wu-du kabahlinawan a kilingkilngan ahebal kya kakitidaan, u hinuki namin ku buyu', micumud i kilakilangan nai' ku calecaledes aca u sakapahay a tataydaan i lalud nu caculilan. hamin nu hinuhinukiyan a kakitidaan taneng kita misa lihalay tayda itida amisahaymaw muculil i laa'dlaa'dan nu kilangkilangan, misaasu' tu mitahaw i kilangkilangan muculil tuni liwanan nu sumamaday a caculilan, yadah ku cacanan nu cilecilekayan a aadihan tu kilang lutuk saka silaculan tu aidangan. . kilangkilangan idaw ku limaay a tataydaan muculil, acaay kita kabiyalaw amapacilal, isasa namin kita i kilangkilangan. uyda sa acacay mihaymaw kita tu sumamaday anipisilsil tu ba'tu nikasilac, alahican masengec supenuc a kaydaan, kapah namin a culilan kya tataydaan.
S.PHON: guan*i guan*i a sakuwan ku ńßsin ¶ńßu. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.* km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺin-pan-ti *.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu paw-r~…ĺiw-ti *.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺa tu **% (atajar~…ĺ) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan guan*i mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu tusa ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina tusa a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, *ar~…ĺaŇč m Ē~ °utu , *ar~…ĺaŇč * Ē~ °jur~…ĺaŇč . guan*i :guan* si* zńßin*****:guan* *i* ziin*) . guan*i "tajwan ŇčajŇčaj a tanaju Ē~ ° makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (**) a kun-r~…ĺi, timur~…ĺan amisan nu a ńß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat tin s…ôpat (**.*) a kun-r~…ĺi. pur~…ĺuŇč nu kakitidaan satar~…ĺakawaj nu buju ńßan u wu ¶uo a buju, tar~…ĺakaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺabut pitu a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan (****) a kun ¶…ô. saka pur~…ĺuŇčan nu kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a nijadu Ē~ ° ńßan kakajdaan nu kadid…ôŇč atu war~…ĺijan nutipan kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan nu kadid…ôŇč kasar~…ĺu Ē~ °im…ôŇčan nu kadid…ôŇč, tawja ka r~…ĺar~…ĺijunan tu sakaudip nu ¶an ¶anan a papar~…ĺiwar~…ĺan tu tuud, naw atu sin ¶u-s…ô kitidaan, ¶utun- ¶…ôn nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu sin ¶u kakitidaan nu tur~…ĺuaj a satabakija nu nijaduan. kapi ¶id…ôkan nu sakaudip ni par~…ĺumaan guan*i a san- ¶aw, kama ¶ar~…ĺ papar~…ĺumaan nanumaj a tipus mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun par~…ĺumaa. u satabakiaj nu papar~…ĺumaan nu tajwan a papar~…ĺumaan a kakitidaan. **%. tada Ē~ ° papar~…ĺumaan ńßan itida i san-r~…ĺin-r~…ĺi , sin-r~…ĺi Ē~ °-r~…ĺi , s…ô-kun-r~…ĺi atu na-ńß…ô-r~…ĺi , papar~…ĺumaan nuńß…ôni mikiańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu tajwan nu s…ôpataj a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (**%) a kir~…ĺa ¶, papar~…ĺumaan tu kama ¶ar~…ĺ ńßan i ¶a ¶aj a bataan (**) a bur~…ĺad katukuńß i sakatusa a mińß ¶aan tu s…ôpataj (*), u sin- ¶u-ku a satabakiaj nu misatadasaj a papar~…ĺumaan, papar~…ĺumaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ńßan mikikaka tu sin- ¶u-kin tu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (**%) a kakir~…ĺa ¶an. papar~…ĺumaan tu u ¶ija itida i ta-ńßan-k…ôn atu kuon- ¶…ô-kuo masababuja Ē~ °aj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunan, u amisan a papar~…ĺumaan tu u ¶ija sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a nijadu, u saka sir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu i tankunŇčaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu au ¶iajan a aar~…ĺan, u sin ¶u-kan stabakiaj nu papar~…ĺumaan a nijadu Ē~ °an, papar~…ĺumaan makaar~…ĺa tu (s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku tusa a kakir~…ĺa ¶an) (**%) nu sin- ¶u-kintu . papar~…ĺumaan tu kama Ē~ ° mami itida i masababuja nu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunan r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu bujubuju Ē~ °an, i na-ńß…ôn-r~…ĺi , sin-r~…ĺi Ē~ °-r~…ĺi , san-r~…ĺin-r~…ĺi , sin-fu Ē~ °-r~…ĺi , i Ē~ °-san-r~…ĺi , ¶in-san-r~…ĺi , ¶…ôn-san-r~…ĺi ku papar~…ĺumaan tu kamakamaan a nijadu Ē~ °. papar~…ĺumaan tu budu Ē~ °, kańßu papar~…ĺumaan ńßan itida i ¶in-san-r~…ĺi , ¶in Ē~ °-san-r~…ĺi atu maw-u-du a nijadu Ē~ °an, u nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw ŇčajŇčaj atu juŇč- ¶u-min masasupadaŇč ku nuńß…ôni tu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. sin- ¶u-ku guan*i aidaŇčan mau-du kakir~…ĺiman a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan matum…ôs nu baŇčsis nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan a ńßa ńßanńßannan sin- ¶u-ku tatajdaan nu pajr~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a midaŇč, kapawanan tu ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, tatajdaan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud a sakapańßaj a midaŇč. sin- ¶u-ku sapakatin…ôŇč tu tatajdaan amidaŇč, tajni i ma-wu-du kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ańß…ômaw r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, sabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a ńßinukijan i sasa Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺiduŇčr~…ĺiduŇčan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu i ¶as ¶assan u sakapańßaj a tatajdaan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺudr~…ĺar~…ĺudan amikir~…ĺiduŇč a aidaŇčan. tajni i bujubuju Ē~ °an misa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ma-wu-du a tatajdaan nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčaan amidaŇč, mańßidańß…ônaj nu sumamadaj kja tatajdaan a midaŇč, u sasar~…ĺamaan ¶a ¶aj ka jadańß kunipi ¶unus tu sasar~…ĺamaan, tan…ôŇč tajda pakunida ńßan ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a tajda itida amisa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, misadid tu sakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu mita, sakanamuńßan mi ¶api tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu tatajdaan numita. . ma-wu-du a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan nu ajawan u " ¶…ôn-sin kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan aaidaŇčan nu kakitidaan" itajda i sin- ¶u-kin guan*i ma-wu-du a nijaduan, ¶…ônsan-r~…ĺi ma-wu-du itidaaj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw, u ŇčajŇčaj namin ku jadańß ¶a ¶aj ¶a ¶aj ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tajar~…ĺu a tad…ômaw. mir~…ĺadaj tu adiwawaw tajda itida a amisa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a sakapańßaj nu papasubanaan a ¶a ¶udadan tu tajdaan nu ¶a ¶udadan, sapab…ôr~…ĺi tu adiwawaw a saka ¶aj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu aadińßan a mata Ē~ °. ma-wu-du kabańßr~…ĺinawan a kir~…ĺiŇčkir~…ĺŇčan ańß…ôbar~…ĺ kja kakitidaan, u ńßinuki namin ku buju Ē~ °, mi ¶umud i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs a ¶a u sakapańßaj a tatajdaan i r~…ĺar~…ĺud nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. ńßamin nu ńßinuńßinukijan a kakitidaan tan…ôŇč kita misa r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tajda itida amisańßajmaw mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i r~…ĺaa Ē~ °dr~…ĺaa Ē~ °dan nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, misaasu Ē~ ° tu mitańßaw i kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tuni r~…ĺiwanan nu sumamadaj a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, jadańß ku ¶a ¶anan nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ô ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan a aadińßan tu kir~…ĺaŇč r~…ĺutuk saka sir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu aidaŇčan. . kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan idaw ku r~…ĺimaaj a tatajdaan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, a ¶aaj kita kabijar~…ĺaw amapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, isasa namin kita i kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan. ujda sa a ¶a ¶aj mińßajmaw kita tu sumamadaj anipisir~…ĺsir~…ĺ tu ba Ē~ °tu nikasir~…ĺa ¶, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mas…ôŇč…ô ¶ sup…ônu ¶ a kajdaan, kapańß namin a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan kja tatajdaan.
S.FORM: Guanxi Guanxi a sakuwan ku Hsinchu. kumud nu kalesakan, 125.2 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu lin-pan-ti 3.89 km¬≤, kalesakan nu paw-liw-ti 2.37 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 468 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 177 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 267 ku yincumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, pakala tu 57% (Atayal) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Guanxi mala 21 a cuwen atu tusa ku niyazu'. kina tusa a niyazu' sa, Qalang m'utu , Qalang q'yulang . Guanxi :guanňč siňč zhinňäÔľõŚõõÁł£ŤÖĒ:guanňä xiňä ziinňč) . Guanxi "Taywan ngayngay a ngalngal han u halu a ngalngalan, guanňč siňč zhinňä, sepat a kinngan nu ngalngalan, guanňä xiňä ziinňč"u Taywan Sin-cu-kin nu cacay a niyadu'an", itida i Sin-cu-se nu wali amisan, u Niwlan sauwac atu fun-san sauwac nu kapulungan a kakaydaan nu nanum. timulan sibiyaw tu Jianshi , hen-saa niyadu' , nutipan timulan militin tu Cun-lin-niyadu'an , nutipan amisan u Sin-pu-niyaduan , amis u Taw-yung-se Lung-tan niyadu' , waliyan mililis tu Taw-yung-se Fusin-niyadu'an ,Tasi-niyadu' u satabakiay nu lilis nu sicuku a masaenalay nu lalaan, tademaw han sayadahay nu ngayngayan, makaala tu sawa nu kilacan, ngalngal han u haylu atu sesin ku ngangangan. naayaw naw Cun-hua-mink-uo lukungu' a kitidaan nu sakatusa a lasubu idaw ku enem (206) a masakaputay nu angangangan a kakitidaan nu hitay. Guanxi sasi laculay nu tuudan, singanganay nu kakanen idaw ku sen-caw , nipacikahan tu kulang , kamulaw , kamacal , kama' , ucia'sa ,micidek ku Guanxi sencaw u sasasingangan, u papalumaan tu sencaw a kakitidaan, sakasilaculan han itini i Taywan u enem a bataan (60%) a kilac. tumihmihcaan idwa tu ku nipikasikawaw tu sencaw hananay a kawaw. Guanxi malumanay a ngangan han u nipacikahan tu kulang tedus han, kadipuna han sumad han tu Guanxi-niyadu' , malalit nu nipacika han tu kulang a dabek "nipacika han tu kulang" sanu dipunnen amiasip mahida u Kansai malecad a asipen, sisa sumad han nu dipu a tademaw katukuh ayda kuni kasi nganganan. amica ku nika ngayngay nami a binacadan, nika u piti yung-cu-min ku sausi tina niyaduan, u yungcumin a tademaw itida i Guanxi pulung han makaala tu cacay tin walu (1.8%)a kilac, saanganganan itida i Guanxi waliyan a buyu nu niyaduan u Cinsan-li idaw ku pinaay nu muengngay a Tayalu itida "Maudu niyadu', Qyulang niyadu'"a niyaduan (ť¶¨ś≠¶ÁĚ£ťÉ®ŤźĹ,śąąŚį§śĶ™(Qyulang)ťÉ®ŤźĹ).. kitidaan Guanxi tada waliyan u Cinsan-li wucuy a buyu' sangucud nu ayam a buyu, tada nutipan u Tun-pin-li law-ken-leaw, tada timulan u I'-san-li San-cuon-ken, tada amisan u Tun-pin-li Naken. . teban nu kitidaan wali kaydaan cacay a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay. cacay a bataan a du (121.10), amis nu uidu' han tusa a bataan idaw ku sebat sepat a walu a du (24.48). nutipan han u masa kubuay a enalan a lala', dumasa wali timulan amis tulu a sasuayawan masababuy nu malalitinay a buyu', u yadahay nu ,masabauybauyay a buyu' nu masa likelunay a lala'. wali nutipan tanayu' makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay (21) a kun-li, timulan amisan nu a hebal han cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat tin sepat (14.4) a kun-li. pulung nu kakitidaan makaala tu cacay a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku lima tin lima (125.5) a pin-bun-kun-li, nu Sin-cu-ku inaka satabakiay nu kakitidaan a niyadu'an. ilabu nu kitidaan satalakaway nu buyu han u wucuo a buyu, talakaw makaala tu cacay a malabut pitu a lasubu siwa a bataan (1790) a kunce. saka pulungan nu kasilaculan a niyadu' han itida i Niw-lan sawac atu Fun'-san sawac nu ni kalalitemuhan a masakayakaya'a sawac nu lala, u Sincu-ku inakaan a niyadu' wali amin nu buyuan, timulan amisan kakaydaan nu kadideng atu waliyan nutipan kalalitemuhan nu kadideng kasalu'imengan nu kadideng, tawya ka laliyunan tu sakaudip nu cancanan a papaliwalan tu tuud, naw atu Sincu-se kitidaan, Cutun-cen nu sakalecad tu Sincu kakitidaan nu tuluay a satabakiya nu niyaduan. kapicidekan nu sakaudip ni palumaan Guanxi a san-caw, kamacal papalumaan nuheni itida i Fun-san sawac nu nikaydaan numasaenalay a lala', papaluma' nu heni tu san-caw a kawaw han u "cacay a mihcaan ku tipus, cacay a mihcaan ku san-caw" u nanumay a tipus malaliyun palumaa. u satabakiay nu papalumaan nu Taywan a papalumaan a kakitidaan. 83%. tada' papalumaan han itida i San-lin-li , Sin-li'-li , Se-kun-li atu Na-he-li , papalumaan nuheni mikiahebal tu Taywan nu sepatay a bataan idaw ku lima (45%) a kilac, papalumaan tu kamacal han i cacay a bataan (10) a bulad katukuh i sakatusa a mihcaan tu sepatay (4), u Sin-cu-ku a satabakiay nu misatadasay a papalumaan, papalumaan a lala' han mikikaka tu Sin-cu-kin tu walu a bataan idaw ku tulu (83%) a kakilacan. papalumaan tu uciya itida i Ta-han-ken atu Kuon-ce-kuo masababuya'ay nu lalikelunan, u amisan a papalumaan tu uciya sakasilaculan a niyadu, u saka silaculan tu i tankunngay a lalaculan tu auciayan a aalan, u Sincu-kan stabakiay nu papalumaan a niyadu'an, papalumaan makaala tu (sepat a bataan idaw ku tusa a kakilacan) (42%) nu Sin-cu-kintu . papalumaan tu kama' mami itida i masababuya nu likelunan lala' atu buyubuyu'an, i Na-hen-li , Sin-li'-li , San-lin-li , Sin-fu'-li , I'-san-li , Cin-san-li , Cen-san-li ku papalumaan tu kamakamaan a niyadu'. papalumaan tu budu', kahu papalumaan han itida i Cin-san-li , Cin'-san-li atu Maw-u-du a niyadu'an, u niyadu'ay a tademaw ngayngay atu yung-cu-min masasupadang ku nuheni tu sakasilaculan. Sin-cu-ku Guanxi aidangan Mau-du kakiliman a kilangkilangan matumes nu bangsis nu kilangkilangan a ha hanhannan Sin-cu-ku tataydaan nu payluma'an a midang, kapawanan tu ku ngelu' a kilangkilangan, tataydaan tu lalud a sakapahay a midang. Sin-cu-ku sapakatineng tu tataydaan amidang, tayni i Ma-wu-du kilangkilangan a muculil ahemaw lihalay culilan, sabangcalay a hinukiyan i sasa' nu lidunglidungan a muculil atu i cascassan u sakapahay a tataydaan tu laludlaludan amikilidung a aidangan. tayni i buyubuyu'an misaculilculil, Ma-wu-du a tataydaan nu kilangkilangaan amidang, mahidahenay nu sumamaday kya tataydaan a midang, u sasalamaan cacay ka yadah kunipicunus tu sasalamaan, taneng tayda pakunida han ku balucu' a tayda itida amisaculilculil i kilangkilangan, misadid tu sakay balucu' nu mita, sakanamuhan micapi tu sakalihalay nu tataydaan numita. . Ma-wu-du a kilangkilangan nu ayawan u "Cen-sin kilangkilangan aaidangan nu kakitidaan" itayda i Sin-cu-kin Guanxi Ma-wu-du a niyaduan, Censan-li Ma-wu-du itidaay muenengay a tademaw, u ngayngay namin ku yadah cacaycacay ku muenengay nu Tayalu a tademaw. miladay tu adiwawaw tayda itida a amisaculilculil salihalay a sakapahay nu papasubanaan a cacudadan tu taydaan nu cacudadan, sapabeli tu adiwawaw a sakacay kalecad nu aadihan a mata'. Ma-wu-du kabahlinawan a kilingkilngan ahebal kya kakitidaan, u hinuki namin ku buyu', micumud i kilakilangan nai' ku calecaledes aca u sakapahay a tataydaan i lalud nu caculilan. hamin nu hinuhinukiyan a kakitidaan taneng kita misa lihalay tayda itida amisahaymaw muculil i laa'dlaa'dan nu kilangkilangan, misaasu' tu mitahaw i kilangkilangan muculil tuni liwanan nu sumamaday a caculilan, yadah ku cacanan nu cilecilekayan a aadihan tu kilang lutuk saka silaculan tu aidangan. . kilangkilangan idaw ku limaay a tataydaan muculil, acaay kita kabiyalaw amapacilal, isasa namin kita i kilangkilangan. uyda sa acacay mihaymaw kita tu sumamaday anipisilsil tu ba'tu nikasilac, alahican masengec supenuc a kaydaan, kapah namin a culilan kya tataydaan.
S.PHON: guan*i guan*i a sakuwan ku ńßsin ¶ńßu. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.* km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺin-pan-ti *.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu paw-r~…ĺiw-ti *.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *** ku jin ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺa tu **% (atajar~…ĺ) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan guan*i mar~…ĺa ** a ¶uw…ôn atu tusa ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina tusa a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, *ar~…ĺaŇč m Ē~ °utu , *ar~…ĺaŇč * Ē~ °jur~…ĺaŇč . guan*i :guan* si* zńßin*****:guan* *i* ziin*) . guan*i "tajwan ŇčajŇčaj a Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ ńßan u ńßar~…ĺu a Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺan, guan* si* zńßin*, s…ôpat a kinŇčan nu Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺan, guan* *i* ziin*"u tajwan sin- ¶u-kin nu ¶a ¶aj a nijadu Ē~ °an", itida i sin- ¶u-s…ô nu war~…ĺi amisan, u niwr~…ĺan sauwa ¶ atu fun-san sauwa ¶ nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kakajdaan nu nanum. timur~…ĺan sibijaw tu *iansńßi , ńß…ôn-saa nijadu Ē~ ° , nutipan timur~…ĺan mir~…ĺitin tu ¶un-r~…ĺin-nijadu Ē~ °an , nutipan amisan u sin-pu-nijaduan , amis u taw-juŇč-s…ô r~…ĺuŇč-tan nijadu Ē~ ° , war~…ĺijan mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu taw-juŇč-s…ô fusin-nijadu Ē~ °an ,tasi-nijadu Ē~ ° u satabakiaj nu r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu si ¶uku a masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan, tad…ômaw ńßan sajadańßaj nu ŇčajŇčajan, makaar~…ĺa tu sawa nu kir~…ĺa ¶an, Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ ńßan u ńßajr~…ĺu atu s…ôsin ku ŇčaŇčaŇčan. naajaw naw ¶un-ńßua-mink-uo r~…ĺukuŇču Ē~ ° a kitidaan nu sakatusa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku …ôn…ôm (***) a masakaputaj nu aŇčaŇčaŇčan a kakitidaan nu ńßitaj. guan*i sasi r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺaj nu tuudan, siŇčaŇčanaj nu kakan…ôn idaw ku s…ôn- ¶aw , nipa ¶ikańßan tu kur~…ĺaŇč , kamur~…ĺaw , kama ¶ar~…ĺ , kama Ē~ ° , u ¶ia Ē~ °sa ,mi ¶id…ôk ku guan*i s…ôn ¶aw u sasasiŇčaŇčan, u papar~…ĺumaan tu s…ôn ¶aw a kakitidaan, sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ńßan itini i tajwan u …ôn…ôm a bataan (**%) a kir~…ĺa ¶. tumińßmińß ¶aan idwa tu ku nipikasikawaw tu s…ôn ¶aw ńßananaj a kawaw. guan*i mar~…ĺumanaj a ŇčaŇčan ńßan u nipa ¶ikańßan tu kur~…ĺaŇč t…ôdus ńßan, kadipuna ńßan sumad ńßan tu guan*i-nijadu Ē~ ° , mar~…ĺar~…ĺit nu nipa ¶ika ńßan tu kur~…ĺaŇč a dab…ôk "nipa ¶ika ńßan tu kur~…ĺaŇč" sanu dipunn…ôn amiasip mańßida u kansai mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a asip…ôn, sisa sumad ńßan nu dipu a tad…ômaw katukuńß ajda kuni kasi ŇčaŇčanan. ami ¶a ku nika ŇčajŇčaj nami a bina ¶adan, nika u piti juŇč- ¶u-min ku sausi tina nijaduan, u juŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw itida i guan*i pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj tin war~…ĺu (*.*%)a kir~…ĺa ¶, saaŇčaŇčanan itida i guan*i war~…ĺijan a buju nu nijaduan u ¶insan-r~…ĺi idaw ku pinaaj nu mu…ôŇčŇčaj a tajar~…ĺu itida "maudu nijadu Ē~ °, *jur~…ĺaŇč nijadu Ē~ °"a nijaduan (*****,***(*jur~…ĺaŇč)**).. kitidaan guan*i tada war~…ĺijan u ¶insan-r~…ĺi wu ¶uj a buju Ē~ ° saŇču ¶ud nu ajam a buju, tada nutipan u tun-pin-r~…ĺi r~…ĺaw-k…ôn-r~…ĺ…ôaw, tada timur~…ĺan u i Ē~ °-san-r~…ĺi san- ¶uon-k…ôn, tada amisan u tun-pin-r~…ĺi nak…ôn. . t…ôban nu kitidaan war~…ĺi kajdaan ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj. ¶a ¶aj a bataan a du (***.**), amis nu uidu Ē~ ° ńßan tusa a bataan idaw ku s…ôbat s…ôpat a war~…ĺu a du (**.**). nutipan ńßan u masa kubuaj a …ônar~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, dumasa war~…ĺi timur~…ĺan amis tur~…ĺu a sasuajawan masababuj nu mar~…ĺar~…ĺitinaj a buju Ē~ °, u jadańßaj nu ,masabaujbaujaj a buju Ē~ ° nu masa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. war~…ĺi nutipan tanaju Ē~ ° makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (**) a kun-r~…ĺi, timur~…ĺan amisan nu a ńß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat tin s…ôpat (**.*) a kun-r~…ĺi. pur~…ĺuŇč nu kakitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima tin r~…ĺima (***.*) a pin-bun-kun-r~…ĺi, nu sin- ¶u-ku inaka satabakiaj nu kakitidaan a nijadu Ē~ °an. ir~…ĺabu nu kitidaan satar~…ĺakawaj nu buju ńßan u wu ¶uo a buju, tar~…ĺakaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺabut pitu a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan (****) a kun ¶…ô. saka pur~…ĺuŇčan nu kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a nijadu Ē~ ° ńßan itida i niw-r~…ĺan sawa ¶ atu fun Ē~ °-san sawa ¶ nu ni kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan a masakajakaja Ē~ °a sawa ¶ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa, u sin ¶u-ku inakaan a nijadu Ē~ ° war~…ĺi amin nu bujuan, timur~…ĺan amisan kakajdaan nu kadid…ôŇč atu war~…ĺijan nutipan kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan nu kadid…ôŇč kasar~…ĺu Ē~ °im…ôŇčan nu kadid…ôŇč, tawja ka r~…ĺar~…ĺijunan tu sakaudip nu ¶an ¶anan a papar~…ĺiwar~…ĺan tu tuud, naw atu sin ¶u-s…ô kitidaan, ¶utun- ¶…ôn nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu sin ¶u kakitidaan nu tur~…ĺuaj a satabakija nu nijaduan. kapi ¶id…ôkan nu sakaudip ni par~…ĺumaan guan*i a san- ¶aw, kama ¶ar~…ĺ papar~…ĺumaan nuńß…ôni itida i fun-san sawa ¶ nu nikajdaan numasa…ônar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, papar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni tu san- ¶aw a kawaw ńßan u " ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan ku tipus, ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan ku san- ¶aw" u nanumaj a tipus mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun par~…ĺumaa. u satabakiaj nu papar~…ĺumaan nu tajwan a papar~…ĺumaan a kakitidaan. **%. tada Ē~ ° papar~…ĺumaan ńßan itida i san-r~…ĺin-r~…ĺi , sin-r~…ĺi Ē~ °-r~…ĺi , s…ô-kun-r~…ĺi atu na-ńß…ô-r~…ĺi , papar~…ĺumaan nuńß…ôni mikiańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu tajwan nu s…ôpataj a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (**%) a kir~…ĺa ¶, papar~…ĺumaan tu kama ¶ar~…ĺ ńßan i ¶a ¶aj a bataan (**) a bur~…ĺad katukuńß i sakatusa a mińß ¶aan tu s…ôpataj (*), u sin- ¶u-ku a satabakiaj nu misatadasaj a papar~…ĺumaan, papar~…ĺumaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ńßan mikikaka tu sin- ¶u-kin tu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (**%) a kakir~…ĺa ¶an. papar~…ĺumaan tu u ¶ija itida i ta-ńßan-k…ôn atu kuon- ¶…ô-kuo masababuja Ē~ °aj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunan, u amisan a papar~…ĺumaan tu u ¶ija sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a nijadu, u saka sir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu i tankunŇčaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu au ¶iajan a aar~…ĺan, u sin ¶u-kan stabakiaj nu papar~…ĺumaan a nijadu Ē~ °an, papar~…ĺumaan makaar~…ĺa tu (s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku tusa a kakir~…ĺa ¶an) (**%) nu sin- ¶u-kintu . papar~…ĺumaan tu kama Ē~ ° mami itida i masababuja nu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunan r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu bujubuju Ē~ °an, i na-ńß…ôn-r~…ĺi , sin-r~…ĺi Ē~ °-r~…ĺi , san-r~…ĺin-r~…ĺi , sin-fu Ē~ °-r~…ĺi , i Ē~ °-san-r~…ĺi , ¶in-san-r~…ĺi , ¶…ôn-san-r~…ĺi ku papar~…ĺumaan tu kamakamaan a nijadu Ē~ °. papar~…ĺumaan tu budu Ē~ °, kańßu papar~…ĺumaan ńßan itida i ¶in-san-r~…ĺi , ¶in Ē~ °-san-r~…ĺi atu maw-u-du a nijadu Ē~ °an, u nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw ŇčajŇčaj atu juŇč- ¶u-min masasupadaŇč ku nuńß…ôni tu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan. sin- ¶u-ku guan*i aidaŇčan mau-du kakir~…ĺiman a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan matum…ôs nu baŇčsis nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan a ńßa ńßanńßannan sin- ¶u-ku tatajdaan nu pajr~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a midaŇč, kapawanan tu ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, sabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a ńßinukijan i sasa Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺiduŇčr~…ĺiduŇčan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu i ¶as ¶assan u sakapańßaj a tatajdaan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺudr~…ĺar~…ĺudan amikir~…ĺiduŇč a aidaŇčan. tajni i bujubuju Ē~ °an misa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ma-wu-du a tatajdaan nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčaan amidaŇč, mańßidańß…ônaj nu sumamadaj kja tatajdaan a midaŇč, u sasar~…ĺamaan ¶a ¶aj ka jadańß kunipi ¶unus tu sasar~…ĺamaan, tan…ôŇč tajda pakunida ńßan ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a tajda itida amisa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, misadid tu sakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu mita, sakanamuńßan mi ¶api tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj nu tatajdaan numita. . ma-wu-du a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan nu ajawan u " ¶…ôn-sin kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan aaidaŇčan nu kakitidaan" itajda i sin- ¶u-kin guan*i ma-wu-du a nijaduan, ¶…ônsan-r~…ĺi ma-wu-du itidaaj mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw, u ŇčajŇčaj namin ku jadańß ¶a ¶aj ¶a ¶aj ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj nu tajar~…ĺu a tad…ômaw. mir~…ĺadaj tu adiwawaw tajda itida a amisa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ kir~…ĺiŇčkir~…ĺŇčan ańß…ôbar~…ĺ kja kakitidaan, u ńßinuki namin ku buju Ē~ °, mi ¶umud i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan nai Ē~ ° ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs a ¶a u sakapańßaj a tatajdaan i r~…ĺar~…ĺud nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. ńßamin nu ńßinuńßinukijan a kakitidaan tan…ôŇč kita misa r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tajda itida amisańßajmaw mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i r~…ĺaa Ē~ °dr~…ĺaa Ē~ °dan nu kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, misaasu Ē~ ° tu aidaŇčan. . kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan idaw ku r~…ĺimaaj a tatajdaan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, a ¶aaj kita kabijar~…ĺaw amapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, isasa namin kita i kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan. ujda sa a ¶a ¶aj mińßajmaw kita tu sumamadaj anipisir~…ĺsir~…ĺ tu ba Ē~ °tu nikasir~…ĺa ¶, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mas…ôŇč…ô ¶ sup…ônu ¶ a kajdaan, kapańß namin a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan kja tatajdaan.
